creator: dwmalone@maths.tcd.ie
text:
On Wed, Jul 04, 2001 at 07:29:40PM -0700, chkno@dork.com wrote:

> 	ntpd dumps core if pieces of /etc/ntp.conf are larger than X bytes

Ntpd is a contributed piece of software, so it would probably be
better to take this up with the people at ntp.org. If you could
download one of their more recent versions and check if the bug
has already been fixed, then we could look into importing a more
recent version.

	David.
